retry_reason: The put operation always executes and should only be called when a valid reference is held; retrying after failure would indicate a use-after-free condition.
contract_summary: Releases a buffer_ref reference stored in a splice_pipe_desc partial entry. It calls buffer_ref_release to decrement the reference count, and then clears the private pointer to prevent reuse. The caller must have previously acquired a valid buffer_ref reference (e.g., via buffer_ref_get) and stored it in spd->partial[i].private. After this function returns, the buffer_ref is no longer valid and must not be accessed. This is typically used when cleaning up splice pipe entries.
